race.comment: SQUAZEEMOTO (10) pushed forward last time and boxed on to finish 0.8 lengths away in second over 1000m at Moe. Best form is at this trip and is long overdue but looks well placed with the big claim off the inside. Gets chance. SLEEPING TIGER (2) returned from a spell last start with a strong win by half a length over 1009m at Yarra Valley. Fitter for that last hitout and looks a big threat again. STEWART (6) was in contention on the corner and progressed nicely last start to finish a close third over 1000m at this track after missing the placings at the previous appearance. Close to a win and expected to be very competitive. PHANTOM PRINCE (1) ran on well to score here fresh and can only be fitter.
